{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/88030392?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/helwor-01", "id": 88030392, "login": "helwor-01", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg4MDMwMzky", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/helwor-01", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-47388", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 2.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}], "description": "### Summary
A low-privilege MCP token holder with knowledge of an attachment path could read any
file in shared storage, including attachments belonging to other bases and workspaces,
because the MCP `readAttachment` tool did not verify the file's ownership.

### Details
The MCP `readAttachment` tool accepts caller-supplied `path`/`url` values and streams
the file via the storage adapter. The handler now looks up the path in
`nc_file_references` and requires a non-deleted row whose `base_id` matches the
caller's MCP context before streaming; otherwise it returns
`Attachment is not accessible from this MCP context`. The lookup tolerates both
`download/uploads/...` and `uploads/...` styles.

### Impact
Arbitrary read against shared storage scoped to attachments the caller's MCP context
should not see. Exploitation requires an MCP token and a known attachment path.

### Credit
This issue was reported by [@helwor-01](https://github.com/helwor-01).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00209, "percentile": 0.11025}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xxpj-q764-9r6q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-05T16:22:28Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xxpj-q764-9r6q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xxpj-q764-9r6q"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47388"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-05T16:22:28Z", "references": ["https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/security/advisories/GHSA-xxpj-q764-9r6q", "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb/releases/tag/2026.05.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xxpj-q764-9r6q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nocodb/nocodb/security-advisories/GHSA-xxpj-q764-9r6q", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/nocodb/nocodb", "summary": "NocoDB: Missing Ownership Check in MCP Attachment Read", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T16:22:33Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xxpj-q764-9r6q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.05.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "nocodb"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.05.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: NocoDB: Missing Ownership Check in MCP Attachment Read
